message:
feat(extensions): add basename and relative to node:path shim (bd-2ej3)

Add basename and relative exports to the node:path polyfill module.
This fixes community extensions that use these standard path utilities.

Extensions fixed:
- tmustier-tab-status (now passes)
- tmustier-files-widget (progresses further, now needs node:fs/promises.readdir)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
